backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining user profiles, poetry, dua, and song content types with CRUD operations, access control via MixinAuthorization, and blob storage via MixinStorage. Includes like functionality and ID generation using counters.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three features: fixing React Query hooks in useQueries.ts, fixing page components for correct data rendering, and fixing MixPage aggregation — each mapped to test IDs and relevant files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key changes, serving as a reference for build planning and understanding recent fixes across hooks, pages, and components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI, including background, foreground, primary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Dard-e-munasif' with a favicon and a root div that mounts the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Mix, Poetry, Dua, Songs, and Admin pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: Admin component that lists all poetry, duas, and songs and allows deletion of each item via a confirmation dialog, with loading skeletons and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/DuaUploadF: Form component for uploading a new Dua with title, content, and optional audio file, tracking upload progress and submitting via the useCreateDua mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/PoetryUplo: Form component for uploading new poetry with title, content, and an optional image file, tracking upload progress and submitting via the useCreatePoetry mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/SongUpload: Form component for uploading a new song with title, artist, and a required audio file, tracking upload progress and submitting via the useCreateSong mutation.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Reusable audio player component with play/pause, seek slider, volume control, and time display; uses stopPropagation to prevent card click events from bubbling.
frontend/src/components/DuaPost.tsx: Dua post card component that opens a FullScreenPostModal on click and handles audio download by fetching bytes, saving to IndexedDB via useDownloads, and triggering a browser download.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenPostMo: A full-screen modal dialog for displaying Poetry or Dua posts with title, image, content, audio, and likes count. Locks background scroll, tracks history, and closes on Escape key.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: A slide-out hamburger menu providing access to browsing history, downloaded audio files, and volume/audio-filter controls. Supports playing/deleting downloads and toggling audio processing modes.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component rendering a sticky header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation links (Mix, Poetry, Dua, Songs), a theme toggle, and the HamburgerMenu.
A full-screen now-playing modal for songs that auto-plays the selected track, displays album art, progress slider, and play/pause controls using the audio playback hook.
frontend/src/components/PINAuthGuard.tsx: A PIN-based authentication guard that wraps admin content, checking sessionStorage for an existing session and prompting for an 8-digit PIN before granting access.
frontend/src/components/PoetryPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a Poetry entry with title, image, truncated content, likes count, and a download button. Opens a FullScreenPostModal on click.
frontend/src/components/SongPost.tsx: Renders a song card with inline play/pause controls and opens a full NowPlayingModal on click, using the useAudioPlayback hook to manage playback state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, initializing admin access control when a token is present and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayback.ts: Provides a singleton-based global audio playback hook with shared state across components, supporting play/pause/seek/volume controls and Web Audio API filter integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloads.ts: Manages offline downloads stored in IndexedDB, exposing add, delete, play, and refresh operations with ready-state gating.
frontend/src/hooks/useHistory.ts: Tracks playback/listen history in IndexedDB, providing addHistoryEntry and refreshHistory helpers with automatic timestamping.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/clear functions and status flags via a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating Poetry, Dua, and Song data from the ICP backend actor, with error extraction and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebAudioFilters.ts: Manages a singleton Web Audio API context with switchable filter chains (standard, clean, ultraclean) that can be connected to an HTMLAudioElement.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Urdu/Devanagari/Inter fonts, defining Tailwind CSS design tokens for light and dark themes, and adding utility animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: PIN-protected admin panel with tabbed UI for uploading and managing poetry, dua, and song content.
frontend/src/pages/DuaPage.tsx: Displays a grid of all duas fetched from the backend, with loading skeletons, error handling, and retry support.
frontend/src/pages/MixPage.tsx: Aggregates poetry, dua, and song content from all queries and displays them sorted by likes as a trending feed.
frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx: Displays a grid of all poetry items fetched from the backend, with loading skeletons, error handling, and retry support.
frontend/src/pages/SongsPage.tsx: Displays a grid of all songs fetched from the backend, with loading skeletons, error handling, and retry support.
frontend/src/utils/indexedDB.ts: Provides IndexedDB helper functions for persisting browsing history (up to 50 entries) and downloaded content blobs locally.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, font families (Inter and Noto Nastaliq Urdu), accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for 'Dard-e-munasif', a multimedia content app with categorized content (Dua, Poetry, Songs, Mix), documenting architectural notes, existing features, known issues (content sections failing to load), and a fix request flag at schema version 1.0.0 / state version 21.
